untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of pending/anticipated news events on an economic calendar and measurement of 'time to event' — neither of which are available in the standard OHLCV indicator set. The rule depends on external event data, not price action or technical indicators. Technical confirmation can be expressed, but the core entry trigger (pending news identification within 1-3 days) cannot be operationalized without calendar/event data source.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally an event-driven strategy that requires integration with an external economic calendar API or news feed. The entry conditions reference 'pending news event identified' and 'time to event: 1 to 3 days', which are not derivable from price/volume data alone. A simplified technical proxy was attempted using directional bias confirmation (price vs SMA_20) and pivot-based exits, but this loses the core predictive logic. Recommend implementing as a separate event-detection rule set with calendar data source, then combining with technical confirmation.
